name: dev
description: General-purpose development guards: blocks hardcoded secrets, direct main pushes, destructive SQL migrations, --no-verify bypasses, comment lines in source code, and monitors CI pipeline status after every push. Works with any project.

_meta.notes: Root manifest for Copilot CLI. mcpServers uses type:local + bash -c + XDG_BIN_HOME path (mirrors mcp-rb-resources pattern). Install binary: GOBIN=$XDG_BIN_HOME go install ... or ln -sf ~/.local/share/go/bin/mcp-git-ops ~/.local/bin/mcp-git-ops. Minimal manifest for Claude Code lives in .claude-plugin/plugin.json.
